chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-392 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on M.A No.4396/21. 3. For hearing of M.A No.2133/21. 4. For hearing of main case. 11.11.2021. Mr. Altaf Sachal Awan, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. Advocate General, Sindh. = Through this petition, the Petitioner has challenged appointment of Chief Executive Officer sought through advertisement dated 28.02.2021 published in various newspapers in Sir Cowasjee Jahangir Institute of Psychiatry and Behaviour Science, Hyderabad on the ground that as per Section 13 of Sir Cowasjee Jahangir Institute of Psychiatry and Behavior Science, Hyderabad Act, 2018 unless the rules are framed there under whereby the qualification of the Chief Officer is determined, no person on that post can be appointed. Learned Addl. A.G along with Dr. Muhammad Usman from D.G Health Sindh (respondent No.3) submits that up-till now rules have not been framed. However, at the same time, the above institute is working without the Chief Executive Officer which is causing problem and hindrance in performance of the institution. He undertakes that as best a qualification as possible has been set for appointment of the Chief Executive Officer and his appointment would be made purely on merits in accordance with the Act. Learned counsel for the petitioner has shown satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms as stated above. However, the process of the appointment of Chief Executive Officer shall continue with due diligence and transparency and shall be made in accordance with the criteria provided by the said Act.

Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms as stated above. However, the process of the appointment of Chief Executive Officer shall continue with due diligence and transparency and shall be made in accordance with the criteria provided by the said Act. JUDGE JUDGE *Hafiz Fahad*
